concept_candidates.label: CNCMachine
concept_candidates.description: A computer-controlled machine tool for automated manufacturing.
concept_candidates.justification: The candidate represents a specific type of machine tool commonly used in manufacturing, aligning with the existing 'Machine' class.

concept_candidates.label: EmergencySituation
concept_candidates.description: A state indicating a serious and immediate threat requiring urgent action.
concept_candidates.justification: The candidate represents a reusable situation type with clear semantic stability and aligns with the 'Temporal Entity' class.

evidence.snippet: Alarm no. 1001 8.2.2 Alarm no. 1002 8.2.3 Alarm no. 1003 Alarm no.: 1001 text: EMERGENCY ACTIVE type: Standard: Optional: effect: Alarm with immediate and controlled shutdown,

ontology_relation_candidates.label: emittedBy
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates an entity or event to the source that produces or generates it.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: This relation captures a reusable semantic pattern of emission or generation, aligning with the 'concerned by' property while focusing on the source.

ontology_relation_candidates.label: negativelyImpacts
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a factor or condition to its negative effect on the functionality of a machine or system.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable, reusable, and meaningful beyond isolated mentions. It aligns with the seed ontology's focus on manufacturing processes and potential disruptions.

ontology_relation_candidates.label: indicates
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a situation or event to an observable signal or property.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: This relation captures the semantic connection between a situation and its detectable manifestation. It aligns with the 'has observable property' hint and is reusable across various contexts.
